metadata.description: Batch 49 - additional Oxford 5000 words 1801-1900; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: a usual direction of change or behavior
words.definitionTh: แนวโน้ม
words.example: Track the tendency of the defect rate.

words.definitionEn: gentle, caring, or easy to damage
words.definitionTh: อ่อนโยน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tender”.

words.definitionEn: mental or physical pressure between opposing forces
words.definitionTh: ความตึงเครียด
words.example: Check cable tension before operation.

words.definitionEn: the period someone holds an office or property
words.definitionTh: วาระการดำรงตำแหน่ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tenure”.

words.definitionEn: the end station of a transport route
words.definitionTh: สถานีปลายทาง
words.example: Connect the wire to the correct terminal.

words.definitionEn: relating to the final stage or end point
words.definitionTh: ระยะสุดท้าย
words.example: The system entered a terminal state.

words.definitionEn: to bring something to an end
words.definitionTh: ยุติ
words.example: Terminate the test after the safety alarm.

words.definitionEn: conditions of an agreement or specialized words
words.definitionTh: เงื่อนไข
words.example: Review the supplier terms before approval.

words.definitionEn: the physical features of an area of land
words.definitionTh: ภูมิประเทศ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “terrain”.

words.definitionEn: to a very serious or unpleasant degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างมาก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “terribly”.

words.definitionEn: extremely good or impressive
words.definitionTh: ยอดเยี่ยม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “terrific”.

words.definitionEn: to make someone feel extreme fear
words.definitionTh: ทำให้หวาดกลัว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “terrify”.

words.definitionEn: an area of land under a government or group
words.definitionTh: ดินแดน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “territory”.

words.definitionEn: extreme fear or violent intimidation
words.definitionTh: ความหวาดกลัว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “terror”.

words.definitionEn: the use of violence to achieve political aims
words.definitionTh: การก่อการร้าย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “terrorism”.

words.definitionEn: a person who uses violence for political aims
words.definitionTh: ผู้ก่อการร้าย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “terrorist”.

words.definitionEn: to give evidence formally
words.definitionTh: ให้การเป็นพยาน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “testify”.

words.definitionEn: a formal statement given as evidence
words.definitionTh: คำให้การ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “testimony”.

words.definitionEn: the process of checking performance or quality
words.definitionTh: การทดสอบ
words.example: Complete system testing before deployment.

words.definitionEn: a book used for formal study
words.definitionTh: ตำราเรียน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “textbook”.

words.definitionEn: the feel or appearance of a surface
words.definitionTh: พื้นผิวสัมผัส
words.example: Surface texture affects image contrast.

words.definitionEn: used to express relief or gratitude
words.definitionTh: โชคดีที่
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thankfully”.

words.definitionEn: relating to drama or exaggerated performance
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับละคร
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “theatrical”.

words.definitionEn: the crime of taking property without permission
words.definitionTh: การขโมย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “theft”.

words.definitionEn: the study of religious belief
words.definitionTh: เทววิทยา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “theology”.

words.definitionEn: based on ideas rather than practical testing
words.definitionTh: เชิงทฤษฎี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “theoretical”.

words.definitionEn: a professional who provides treatment or support
words.definitionTh: นักบำบัด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “therapist”.

words.definitionEn: after that time
words.definitionTh: หลังจากนั้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thereafter”.

words.definitionEn: as a result of that action
words.definitionTh: ด้วยเหตุนั้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thereby”.

words.definitionEn: a long academic research document
words.definitionTh: วิทยานิพนธ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thesis”.

words.definitionEn: complete and careful in every detail
words.definitionTh: ละเอียดถี่ถ้วน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thorough”.

words.definitionEn: in a complete and careful way
words.definitionTh: อย่างละเอียด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thoroughly”.

words.definitionEn: showing care for other people
words.definitionTh: ช่างคิด / ใส่ใจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thoughtful”.

words.definitionEn: causing people to think deeply
words.definitionTh: กระตุ้นความคิด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thought-provoking”.

words.definitionEn: a thin strand used for sewing or discussion sequence
words.definitionTh: เส้นด้าย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thread”.

words.definitionEn: a level at which something begins or changes
words.definitionTh: เกณฑ์
words.example: Set the rejection threshold carefully.

words.definitionEn: very excited and pleased
words.definitionTh: ตื่นเต้นมาก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thrilled”.

words.definitionEn: to grow and develop successfully
words.definitionTh: เจริญเติบโต
words.example: The model can thrive with diverse data.

words.definitionEn: the short thick finger of the hand
words.definitionTh: นิ้วหัวแม่มือ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “thumb”.

words.definitionEn: the regular rise and fall of the sea
words.definitionTh: น้ำขึ้นน้ำลง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tide”.

words.definitionEn: to make something tighter
words.definitionTh: ทำให้แน่น
words.example: Tighten the bracket bolts.

words.definitionEn: wood prepared for building
words.definitionTh: ไม้ซุง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “timber”.

words.definitionEn: happening at a useful or suitable time
words.definitionTh: ถูกเวลา
words.example: Provide timely feedback after the trial.

words.definitionEn: the choice of when an action happens
words.definitionTh: จังหวะเวลา
words.example: Adjust the reject timing in the PLC.

words.definitionEn: a group of similar cells or thin material
words.definitionTh: เนื้อเยื่อ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tissue”.

words.definitionEn: a plant used to make smoking products
words.definitionTh: ยาสูบ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tobacco”.

words.definitionEn: willingness to accept differences or difficulty
words.definitionTh: ความอดทน
words.example: Set the dimensional tolerance.

words.definitionEn: to accept something unpleasant without reacting
words.definitionTh: อดทนต่อ
words.example: The enclosure must tolerate vibration.

words.definitionEn: a number of deaths or a charge for use
words.definitionTh: ยอดผู้เสียหาย / ค่าธรรมเนียม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “toll”.

words.definitionEn: to be higher than or exceed
words.definitionTh: อยู่เหนือ
words.example: The camera topped the previous accuracy result.

words.definitionEn: to cause severe physical or mental suffering
words.definitionTh: ทรมาน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “torture”.

words.definitionEn: to throw lightly
words.definitionTh: โยน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “toss”.

words.definitionEn: to add up to a final amount
words.definitionTh: รวมเป็น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “total”.

words.definitionEn: a competition involving several games
words.definitionTh: การแข่งขัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tournament”.

words.definitionEn: poisonous or harmful
words.definitionTh: เป็นพิษ
words.example: Keep toxic chemicals away from the station.

words.definitionEn: to follow, copy, or a visible sign left behind
words.definitionTh: ติดตาม / ร่องรอย
words.example: Trace each defect to its source.

words.definitionEn: a legally protected brand name or symbol
words.definitionTh: เครื่องหมายการค้า
words.example: Verify the approved trademark usage.

words.definitionEn: the activity of buying and selling
words.definitionTh: การค้า
words.example: The supplier is active in international trading.

words.definitionEn: a serious event involving suffering and loss
words.definitionTh: โศกนาฏกรรม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tragedy”.

words.definitionEn: causing great sadness or disaster
words.definitionTh: น่าเศร้า
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tragic”.

words.definitionEn: a track or route through an area
words.definitionTh: เส้นทาง
words.example: The audit trail records every change.

words.definitionEn: a vehicle pulled behind another
words.definitionTh: รถพ่วง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “trailer”.

words.definitionEn: a distinguishing quality of a person or thing
words.definitionTh: ลักษณะ
words.example: Contrast is an important visual trait.

words.definitionEn: a business exchange recorded by a system
words.definitionTh: ธุรกรรม
words.example: Log each database transaction.

words.definitionEn: a written record of spoken words
words.definitionTh: บันทึกคำพูด
words.example: Review the meeting transcript.

words.definitionEn: a major change in form or condition
words.definitionTh: การเปลี่ยนแปลง
words.example: Automation supports digital transformation.

words.definitionEn: movement of people or goods through an area
words.definitionTh: การขนส่งผ่าน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “transit”.

words.definitionEn: the act of sending energy, data, or disease
words.definitionTh: การส่งผ่าน
words.example: Check signal transmission quality.

words.definitionEn: to send a signal or information
words.definitionTh: ส่งผ่าน
words.example: The sensor transmits data to the PLC.

words.definitionEn: openness that makes actions easy to understand
words.definitionTh: ความโปร่งใส
words.example: Data transparency supports trust.

words.definitionEn: easy to see through or openly explained
words.definitionTh: โปร่งใส
words.example: Use a transparent cover only if reflections are controlled.

words.definitionEn: a device or situation designed to catch something
words.definitionTh: กับดัก
words.example: Avoid creating a dirt trap near the lens.

words.definitionEn: a deeply disturbing experience or injury
words.definitionTh: บาดแผลทางใจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “trauma”.

words.definitionEn: valuable objects or something greatly valued
words.definitionTh: สมบัติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “treasure”.

words.definitionEn: a formal agreement between countries
words.definitionTh: สนธิสัญญา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “treaty”.

words.definitionEn: extremely large or impressive
words.definitionTh: มหาศาล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tremendous”.

words.definitionEn: relating to a tribe
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับชนเผ่า
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tribal”.

words.definitionEn: a social group with shared culture or ancestry
words.definitionTh: ชนเผ่า
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tribe”.

words.definitionEn: an act showing respect or gratitude
words.definitionTh: การยกย่อง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tribute”.

words.definitionEn: to cause an event; something that causes it
words.definitionTh: กระตุ้น / ตัวกระตุ้น
words.example: The sensor triggers the reject gate.

words.definitionEn: the number one million million
words.definitionTh: หนึ่งล้านล้าน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “trillion”.

words.definitionEn: a group of three people or things
words.definitionTh: กลุ่มสามคน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “trio”.

words.definitionEn: a great victory or achievement
words.definitionTh: ชัยชนะ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “triumph”.

words.definitionEn: a group of soldiers
words.definitionTh: กองกำลัง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “troop”.

words.definitionEn: a prize awarded for success
words.definitionTh: ถ้วยรางวัล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “trophy”.

words.definitionEn: experiencing problems or worry
words.definitionTh: มีปัญหา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “troubled”.

words.definitionEn: a person legally responsible for property or an organization
words.definitionTh: ผู้ดูแลผลประโยชน์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “trustee”.

words.definitionEn: a very large sea wave caused by underwater movement
words.definitionTh: สึนามิ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tsunami”.

words.definitionEn: money paid for teaching, especially at college
words.definitionTh: ค่าเล่าเรียน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tuition”.

words.definitionEn: an abnormal mass of tissue
words.definitionTh: เนื้องอก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tumor”.

words.definitionEn: the number of people who participate
words.definitionTh: จำนวนผู้เข้าร่วม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “turnout”.

words.definitionEn: the rate of staff replacement or business sales
words.definitionTh: อัตราการเปลี่ยนคน / รายได้หมุนเวียน
words.example: Track staff turnover and inventory turnover separately.

words.definitionEn: to bend into a new shape; a turning movement
words.definitionTh: บิด / การบิด
words.example: Do not twist the fiber cable.

words.definitionEn: final or most important
words.definitionTh: สูงสุด
words.example: The ultimate goal is reliable automatic detection.

words.definitionEn: not satisfactory or allowed
words.definitionTh: ยอมรับไม่ได้
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “unacceptable”.

words.definitionEn: lack of certainty
words.definitionTh: ความไม่แน่นอน
words.example: Quantify measurement uncertainty.

words.definitionEn: not permitted by a constitution
words.definitionTh: ขัดรัฐธรรมนูญ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “unconstitutional”.

words.definitionEn: to experience or be subjected to something
words.definitionTh: ผ่าน / ประสบ
words.example: The system must undergo validation.

words.definitionEn: a university student before a first degree
words.definitionTh: นักศึกษาปริญญาตรี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “undergraduate”.

words.definitionEn: basic but not obvious and supporting what is seen
words.definitionTh: ที่อยู่เบื้องล่าง
words.example: Investigate the underlying cause.
